message:
Add Rule and Table conformance test modules

rule_tests.rs:
- RuleTest struct implementing TestCase trait
- Configurable: title, character, alignment, width
- python_rich_code() generates equivalent Python Rich code
- standard_rule_tests(): 6 test cases covering no_title, with_title,
  left/right align, custom_char, ASCII mode
- Unit tests for individual rule rendering

table_tests.rs:
- TableTest struct implementing TestCase trait
- Configurable: columns, rows, width, show_header, show_lines
- python_rich_code() generates equivalent Python Rich code
- standard_table_tests(): 5 test cases covering simple, no_header,
  with_lines, single_column, narrow
- Unit tests for table rendering and headers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
